Class HistoryquoteDateOHLC

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.dto.HistoryquoteDateOHLC
public class HistoryquoteDateOHLC extends Object
Data transfer object for OHLC (Open-High-Low-Close) historical quote data used in candlestick and OHLC charts. This DTO extends the basic date/close structure with open, high, and low price fields needed for advanced chart visualization.

      public HistoryquoteDateOHLC()

    • HistoryquoteDateOHLC

      public HistoryquoteDateOHLC(LocalDate date, Double open, Double high, Double low, Double close, Long volume)
      Constructs a HistoryquoteDateOHLC from LocalDate and price values.
      Parameters:
      date - the trading date
      open - the opening price
      high - the highest price
      low - the lowest price
      close - the closing price
      volume - the trading volume
